name: Troy
subject: Thank you to America’s finest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
Today, on Memorial Day, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you to all the brave men and women who have given everything to protect this country. It’s because of their dedication and bravery that we are able to enjoy the freedoms and prosperity of being an American.
| | | | [ ](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bfett-yhdyitiujj-r/)

Peter,
Today, on Memorial Day, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you to all the brave men and women who have given everything to protect this country.
It’s because of their dedication and bravery that we are able to enjoy the freedoms and prosperity of being an American.
America’s veterans are the finest in the world.
As a veteran myself, I will always keep my fellow soldiers who didn’t make it back home and their families in my prayers.
Remember the fallen,
Troy

name: Mike Braun
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jyklihjl-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, The word “hero” is thrown around a lot these days. Sometimes merited, other times not. But there’s one group of people who have more than earned the title. Today is the day we remember and honor those American heroes, the men and women of our Armed Forces, who have made the ultimate sacrifice to defend the Nation we love and cherish. As our friends and families gather around the grill, let us never forget that our freedom to do so was earned by the unmatched courage and dedication of those who laid down their lives. Thank you to the Hoosier families who bear the burden of their sacrifice each and every day. Our gratitude will always be with you. In Their Honor, Mike Braun |

name: Chris McDaniel
subject: Thank you to those who serve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
I wanted to say a heartfelt thank you to all the brave men and women who are serving our country in uniform, and to those who gave up everything to keep us safe. Americans are able to enjoy the liberties and freedoms in peace thanks to the sacrifices of our military. | | | | [ ](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bfkitk-ydllhlurty-r/)
---
Peter,
I wanted to say a heartfelt thank you to all the brave men and women who are serving our country in uniform, and to those who gave up everything to keep us safe.
Americans are able to enjoy the liberties and freedoms in peace thanks to the sacrifices of our military.
Every single person in uniform is an American hero.
If you or someone you know has a loved one serving our country, always remember that you have the undying gratitude of an entire nation.
Thank you,
Chris

name: The White House
subject: The heroes who rest in these hallowed fields
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6e0af1c42d2fbf73ef967894bbab7e3d15f7fb29e9cd4314c3e517e2819caf40e262525556700a80c2ed5dff49ee2ac4faa98c6f5a54b960) The White House • May 29, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump is meeting with Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar and Director of the National Institutes of Health (NIH) Francis Collins in the Oval Office to discuss NIH research initiatives, including work on opioids. |
---
|

## The heroes who rest in these hallowed fields
**President Trump visited Arlington National Cemetery in Virginia yesterday** to commemorate Memorial Day and pay tribute to those who lost their lives defending America. "The heroes who rest in these hallowed fields--in the cemeteries, battlefields, and burial grounds near and far--are drawn from the full tapestry of American life," he said.
**Memorial Day is an occasion to honor those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country**. As we remember those warriors, it is also a moment to consider how we can make life better for all of America's heroes in uniform, including our veterans.
**In the near future, President Trump will take an important step** toward correcting how the United States treats its veteran population. He will sign the VA MISSION Act, which will transform the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) into a high-performing and integrated healthcare system for the 21st century by putting choice at the core of the VA program.
[Watch President Trump's Memorial Day message. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6e0af1c42d2fbf7372cb58687ce4d9d113e61463fc5a28d46f9dddc0d4c3b4fc4fc2a25748ee849c074db8d58c9cd4aa75ddd7844b515e68)
**More** : [This Memorial Day, a win for America's veterans](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6e0af1c42d2fbf731fcf323eef7e119f89699aec1c68d2aac5ada1066261b1d7416b364fba3cb5969e0af9ae9e196966d3d534d7e324931d)

---
|

## Taxpayers, unions, and the Federal workforce
**Federal agencies pay for union negotiators' salaries** , so it hurts taxpayers when bargaining drags on for years. The salaries for union negotiators totaled $16 million in 2016 alone. And more than 470 Veterans Affairs employees spend 100 percent of their duty hours working for a labor union instead of serving veterans--including 74 full-time nurses.
**A new Executive Order from President Trump** will require agencies to negotiate better union contracts more efficiently and transparently. It will eliminate years of costly drawn-out bargaining by encouraging agencies to conclude labor negotiations in less than a year. Moreover, any Federal employees authorized to act on behalf of unions will be permitted to spend no more than 25 percent of their time on union business.
[Learn more about President Trump's Civil Service reforms that put taxpayers first.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6e0af1c42d2fbf738a48def1c4697d22c06cf6f392ddef67d0e0f83d80302193a50e2e4d6d13342241610ef4229c2af956499bb63c52ad63)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump participates in a Memorial Day ceremony** | May 28, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6e0af1c42d2fbf739176406ba3abd541738cdf54f13015708c92b28a44fa9ee42d9e49f83c2a9b6656f5e119625d6662f665aa3eb4dc24b9) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6e0af1c42d2fbf73055770ec71a63fa26c5491f8163b7dcf0f651b46efc0b2859c15ac8f7bdc33e953aa85b7276ac11dc91c2a3eac0b4d47) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d40426581666044546bab004cc48e6fedc421095d29b6d4eff9c125f414c9d6029e2541c234544ab21dec630fa65579f4d302e780b6679a59c)
---

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: What I said on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Last Sunday, I joined MSNBC's Kasie Hunt for a one-on-one interview about our campaign and my position on a number of important topics. While I am always excited to talk policy, what I was most proud to share with audiences nationwide was the strength of our incredible grassroots campaign and the ways we're engaging thousands of voters in every corner of the 7th District.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/6epKrZAQ7Mrc8FsHJkPCZqtFu8pyW8hN-8rooxsv-Ww=?refcode=may29)

Between our more than 100 meet and greets and our network of nearly 1,300 volunteers, we are giving Central Virginians access to the political process in a way they've never had before. Our success means they'll have a platform to make their voices heard. The current partisan discourse in Washington isn't helping or serving anyone, but I'm confident that through campaigns like ours, we'll change that.

We are just 14 short days from our June 12 Democratic Primary, Peter, and our team is giving it all we've got. A decisive win will show people nationwide that we have the energy and momentum to turn VA-7 Blue. [**Can you make a contribution now to fuel our fast-approaching GOTV efforts?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/6epKrZAQ7Mrc8FsHJkPCZqtFu8pyW8hN-8rooxsv-Ww=?refcode=may29)

[$25 for a box of printer paper](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/MZt-b3yORYssfFhvWyUjUXkc7o-XnsCPvB82YTE56xo=?refcode=may29&amount=25)
[$50 for 40 clipboards](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/MZt-b3yORYssfFhvWyUjUXkc7o-XnsCPvB82YTE56xo=?refcode=may29&amount=50)
[$100 for volunteer coffee and snacks for 1 phone bank](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/MZt-b3yORYssfFhvWyUjUXkc7o-XnsCPvB82YTE56xo=?refcode=may29&amount=100)
[$250 for ink for all office printers](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/MZt-b3yORYssfFhvWyUjUXkc7o-XnsCPvB82YTE56xo=?refcode=may29&amount=250)
[$500 for canvassing literature](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/MZt-b3yORYssfFhvWyUjUXkc7o-XnsCPvB82YTE56xo=?refcode=may29&amount=500)

These last 14 days are going to fly by, but with you on our team I know we'll make the most of every one of them.

Thank you so much for your support.

\- Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/VTpUTAfWEE32LCsSquOGpTuaZKPYQkQqH66_70kmgR4=?refcode=adela)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/5Axd8288dtxRMeZjvorKN_rCg9KbNdE20EzluCVoC8M=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/TBXZJEBr6iyIVdlVM3T-9IAnLxSfGIif8nmy4CMszZI=/ZLhOy4aA_4q_zSvp90_lzjBgn4rwrlXWmOA0JT6C5o0=)_

subject: You have not supported the Democratic Party yet this year → Donate before Thursday's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Tom and I have been talking your ears off about this new DNC, and it's because we're excited about the work we're doing together.
---
Tom and I have been talking your ear off about this new DNC -- because we're excited about the work we're doing together.

We're investing in true grassroots organizing in every community across this great nation so we can win back Congress with people power. But we must fight for our values in every race, in every state, every year.

No one else is going to get it done if we don't -- so I'm asking you to step up before Thursday's deadline.

**Contribute $3 before Thursday's deadline to help Democrats win in all 50 states this year.**

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e7e/1082952340/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e7f/1082952340/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e7c/1082952340/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd")
** Before last year we had not been nearly as focused on grassroots organizing across the country as we should've been. I can promise you that's changing -- but only if supporters like you are ready to be a part of it.

It's a lot of work, but we're already winning in some of the reddest states and districts in the country -- and we're just getting started.

**[I am counting on you to be a part of this. Contribute $3 before Thursday's deadline to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e7d/1082952340/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Youve+already+c&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e7a/1082952340/VEsFBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e7b/1082952340/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e78/1082952340/VEsFAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e84/4067b0a/5af1ea022/7e460e79/1082952340/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180529_ke_nd&source=em_20180529_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180529_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Tom and I have been talking your ears off about this new DNC, and it's because we're excited about the work we're doing together. Tom and I have been talking your ear off about this new DNC -- because we're excited about the work we're doing together. We're investing in true grassroots organizing in every community across this great nation so we can win back Congress with people power. But we must fight for our values in every race, in every state, every year. No one else is going to get it done if we don't -- so I'm asking you to step up before Thursday's deadline. Contribute $3 before Thursday's deadline to help Democrats win in all 50 states this year. "" "" "" "" "" "" Before last year we had not been nearly as focused on grassroots organizing across the country as we should've been. I can promise you that's changing -- but only if supporters like you are ready to be a part of it. It's a lot of work, but we're already winning in some of the reddest states and districts in the country -- and we're just getting started. "" Thanks for your support, Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
Fellow American,

Not only do I believe we are going to keep the House, but I think our pro-growth agenda is just getting started.
**[And, I’m willing to put my money where my mouth is and TRIPLE any contribution you make to keep the House.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTQ5LWIyYjM4Mjg5OTRkMzRkMjM4YjgyYTZjNjc0YmJlM2Qy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLm5yY2Mub3JnL2ZlYy1lbmQtb2YtcXVhcnRlci1kZWFkbGluZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1wO2Ftb3VudD0yNSZhbXA7dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsUHJvc3BlY3QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNTI5X1BBRS1HT1AzX1BhdWxSeWFuJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNTI5X2xldHNnb3dpbg&K=E4pZEoca59Kl0vIDyRKbxg)**

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Disgusting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TH-3-Iu7H_Jb_xvhc1wIF_B_MPM_q8lb9eP_E4idEe8=/1k6ptAa1alddZh7t5maPk54XMa6xMwHaoryvTYSdZqY=) Friends and Neighbors -- I was - and still am - absolutely horrified to have read **[the news about a very disturbing new video game](https://act.myngp.com/el/TH-3-Iu7H_Jb_xvhc1wIF_B_MPM_q8lb9eP_E4idEe8=/uLi-f1nEnj1XGpa7BiQKmcqJrEWjMRpSTcihoQGM250=)** , which effectively simulates school shootings - much like the one that recently took place in Parkland. **This is disturbing. This is offensive. This is unacceptable. But above all else, this is disgusting.** This game is being published not by some unknown start-up - but by the Valve Corporation - which is founded by former Microsoft executives. **Valued at over $3 billion, they are the most profitable company per employee in the country. ** This is not a partisan issue. All elected officials -- including Governor Scott and CFO Patronis -- should denounce this vile garbage in the strongest terms possible. As a candidate for Chief Financial Officer, I am calling on all investors to pull their money from this company as well as business partners, such as Cisco Systems. And, as a parent, **I am calling on all of us to ban any game published by this company** from our homes. I know I will. [Boycott "Active Shooter". Add your name. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/TH-3-Iu7H_Jb_xvhc1wIF_B_MPM_q8lb9eP_E4idEe8=/z2tMpYyfNK2sOYsjXRy3ohoU_QbQDVLbnCUv536ZdSQ=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) **[Please join me in calling for a boycott of this incredibly appalling and insensitive game.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TH-3-Iu7H_Jb_xvhc1wIF_B_MPM_q8lb9eP_E4idEe8=/z2tMpYyfNK2sOYsjXRy3ohoU_QbQDVLbnCUv536ZdSQ=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Please spread the word on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//act.myngp.com/Forms/3962978480851257856?)** and **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/home?status=https%3A//act.myngp.com/Forms/3962978480851257856?)**. name: Jeffrey Carson, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Best week of the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I hope you had a great Memorial Day weekend! I know it’s typically a fun weekend with family & friends and some good food, but I hope you took some time to reflect on those who have given their lives while serving our country. We are forever indebted to them and their families for their sacrifice. There is an ongoing joke at the campaign office that I say, “This is the best of the week campaign” all of the time. Well, it seems like each week we get better and better news! So, I am happy to inform you that this past week was the best of the campaign :) **Poll: Austin is CRUSHING Claire McCaskill** The Gravis Marketing poll showed Austin beating Claire McCaskill 56 to 40. A few things about the poll.... 1\. The results were surprising even to us. We certainly had a feeling we would do better against McCaskill than Hawley, but not by such a large margin. This is fantastic news, Friend, and we ALL need to talk about this until the cows come home. 2\. When you share the news on social media, please use [**this story.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.breitbart.com%2F2018-elections%2F2018%2F05%2F23%2Fpoll-claire-mccaskill-trails-gop-challengers-by-7-14-percent%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_update&n=1) Share it with all of your friends! If you would like to see the full results, please [**click here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/gravis_poll?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_update&n=2) 3\. Bottom line: "Austin Petersen is the strongest GOP candidate against Claire McCaskill, and the polling confirms this." - get used to saying that over and over! And always share the link to the [**poll results.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.breitbart.com%2F2018-elections%2F2018%2F05%2F23%2Fpoll-claire-mccaskill-trails-gop-challengers-by-7-14-percent%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_update&n=3) 4\. If you have friends or family that work in local or national media, or just have a favorite radio or news show that you would like to have Austin on, please share the results with them! **Mizzou College Republicans Interview** Austin sat down with the Mizzou College Republicans for an interview about creating jobs, college affordability and North Korea. You can watch it by [**clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmucrs%2Fvideos%2F1672897616079207%2FUzpfSTI5NDI5MTczNzI5NjQ4MDoxODE5ODI0Mjg4MDc2NTQz%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_update&n=4) **Petersen Could Shake Up Midterms for GOP** Besides the dozen news outlets that covered the poll this week, we all received some great press from Newsmax. I love how the article starts: _“Yet again, the old political order is being disturbed by pesky grassroots simply refusing to just go away. This time the culprit is a young, charming Missouri firebrand, Austin Petersen.”_ You can read the full article by [**clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newsmax.com%2Fchristopherreid%2Fcongressional-mccaskill-missouri%2F2018%2F05%2F25%2Fid%2F862460%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_update&n=5) Later this afternoon, Heather is going to shoot you an email as well. Please be on the lookout for that. Thanks, Friend. We couldn’t do this without you. Jeffrey Carson
Campaign Manager
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---
Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate

If you have friends or family that work in local or national media, or just have a favorite radio or news show that you would like to have Austin on, please share the results with them! Mizzou College Republicans Interview Austin sat down with the Mizzou College Republicans for an interview about creating jobs, college affordability and North Korea. You can watch it by Petersen Could Shake Up Midterms for GOP Besides the dozen news outlets that covered the poll this week, we all received some great press from Newsmax. I love how the article starts: “Yet again, the old political order is being disturbed by pesky grassroots simply refusing to just go away. This time the culprit is a young, charming Missouri firebrand, Austin Petersen.” You can read the full article by Later this afternoon, Heather is going to shoot you an email as well. Please be on the lookout for that. Thanks, Friend. We couldn’t do this without you. Jeffrey Carson Campaign Manager Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate

| | Friends,

As a direct result of our conservative tax overhaul, millions of hardworking Americans have received bonuses or pay increases, but Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) called more money in your pocket **_"crumbs."_**

**Can you believe that?** She's also indicated that if Democrats take control of the House this year, they'll waste no time in raising your taxes. I would **_never_** let that happen.

More money for hardworking Alabamians sure doesn't seem like "crumbs" to me. I voted to cut taxes, and I will always fight against Democrats' efforts to raise them.

Watch and share my fourth TV ad [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=99A121A9A3680).

\- Martha

subject: This has been a big month.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
** This has been a big month.
------------------------------------------------------------

Just this past weekend not only did we have a huge heat wave, but we also brought the heat at the Zimmerman Wild West days parade. We had a great showing, and people were thrilled to see so many DFLers representing at the parade.

We also made it to a handful of DFL picnics across the district and held a couple of meet and greets for Ian. Other than that it has been a whole lot of door knocking on these wonderful summer days.

** This is all because of your support!
------------------------------------------------------------
Without your help, we wouldn't be able to get all of the supplies we need to run these events. All of our literature, T-Shirts, and yard signs are funded by passionate supporters like yourself.

We are reaching the end of the month, and we are still $1,000 short of our goal. Please, donate today, so that we can keep on knocking on doors, and showing up at parades.

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: ICYMI: 46 Years Later New Jersey to Elect Gop Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
New Jersey hasn’t sent a Republican to the U.S. Senate since 1972...but 46 years later, the GOP might be able to pick up a seat in the Garden State. S | |
---
**IN CASE YOU MISSED IT: 46 YEARS LATER NEW JERSEY TO ELECT GOP SENATOR**
|
---
**HUGIN/MENENDEZ ALMOST EVEN |** A Fairleigh Dickinson University poll released Friday shows proven New Jersey job creator and former Marine Bob Hugin nearly tied with corrupt ineffective career politician Bob Menendez in the race for U.S. Senate. While 28 percent of voters supported Menendez, 24 percent back Hugin. An additional 46 percent were undecided. (Poll, [Hugin/Menendez Almost Even](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=af1e1a313c904fb99a017f625b893bb4&_e=b6ICHxNugiAffsuov9q-8RX3tQusxx4pgtdYVP4x83uTWSa2CgtuxleZ-m4eK7vSk7kWynJXwQT8MvaigalELRXGJPSwadnOtFoZP-DZwob8EsXrzPLzvLvUOnFPPQGoh8RHRXDO6UwoTn3BPHesJlY_kXy6FuEakGsZCQcNBh-YwmsnLa38e2ZrhSkTQDpQVSRdn-KdJZEuTrdFczGFnDZP5Kd-r4TvrbUT3SAPRzUOVMmL4gnNWtw-4uodqk768GwOi8G1YOoC61u3soJS5uZKZnEwR8HdnCWCF1ClUs-rwpr861thrvrb2ZFLK_rGtHqRVgrK1PGCO0CUH5YYgXF_W6T6GJoShbI63oJtChas4jtAajmHfIfzwXOYPQofVMKO-7SFLU_OmPODaWYJJQ%3D%3D), 05/25/18)
**GOP MIGHT PICK UP A SENATE SEAT IN NEW JERSEY |** “New Jersey hasn’t sent a Republican to the U.S. Senate since 1972...but 46 years later, the GOP might be able to pick up a seat in the Garden State. Sen. Bob Menendez, a Democrat, is up for re-election, and recent polls indicate he is not very popular in his home state. Just 22 percent of adults said they view the two-term senator favorably, while 35 percent view him unfavorably. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: We can do better
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3093/9e00690/47a6f1d9/240236cb/3793857538/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Hello --

I didn't decide to run for Governor because I like seeing my name on signs or because I grew up wanting to be a politician.

I've always believed that people should run hard on the issues that matter to our communities. I got into public service to make a difference in people's lives. And I decided to run for Governor because I knew we could rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us, and it was going to take the right leader to help do it.

I believe in fighting for what's right, and I truly believe I am the right person to help fix the mess Rick Scott is leaving behind -- but I need your help.

**[We have a critical fundraising deadline coming up on Thursday. Can I count on you to chip in $5 now to help make sure we hit our goal?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3093/9e00690/47a6f1d9/240236ca/3793857538/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_758&refcode=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+We+have+a+critical+fundraising+deadline+")**

I know that every Floridian deserves access to quality, affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs to support their families, and our teachers and staff deserve to be paid more than what they are. These aren't radical ideas, but I'm the only candidate who has laid out plans to make them happen.

We can do better for our state and for future generations -- and we can start by electing a true progressive to the Governor's Mansion.

**[I believe that we will win. So please, chip in $5 before our fundraising deadline Thursday night to help make it happen.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3093/9e00690/47a6f1d9/240236cd/3793857538/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_758&refcode=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+I+believe+that+we+will+win+So+please+chi")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3093/9e00690/47a6f1d9/240236cc/3793857538/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_758&refcode=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180529_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I need your help, Koch group attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | We can't let this go, team. The Koch-backed group Americans for Prosperity is running ads against me. **I am relying on you to respond -- and quickly.** [**_We only have another 48 hours to reach $7,500 in our Rapid Response Fund. Can you give?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fde/622b7b5b/1af238bd/307b8299/223195357/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524b?refcode=dwse180524b_b&recurring=true&amount=5") The Kochs don't like me for the same reasons President Trump and his Republican allies in Congress don't like me -- I speak out for what I believe in. I don't let Republicans in Washington get away with handing tax breaks to billionaires, defunding Planned Parenthood, or any number of anti-middle class moves. The Kochs can attack me all they like. It won't change my advocacy for the families of South Florida. To me, it's just a sign -- if they're willing to spend money attacking me, then I must be doing something right. But those attacks can't go unanswered. We need a strong grassroots response. And for that, I need you. [**_So if you can, give $5 or more in the next 48 hours._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fde/622b7b5b/1af238bd/307b8299/223195357/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524b?refcode=dwse180524b_b&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for your help today. I truly appreciate all you do to make this team stronger. Debbie
---

|
---

name: FL Governor Watch
subject: 3 brand-new red flags
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Hey,

We are ALARMED about the state of the Republican primary for Florida's governorship. Ron DeSantis and Adam Putnam are making this by far **the most extreme, far-right, Trump-loving field of candidates Florida has ever seen.**

name: Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
subject: Hoping you have a moment…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/R_1XtXL2HLWIAfzBrmIgye1IZt0P5BHDz5oPmZa58ps=/EIzX1a4iO5Du1gb8YLXIHn9lHkGE4PMBNQ7IndhYyQQ=?refcode=May-29-Voters-should-have-a-choice)

Friend,
**Hi there -- it's Mary. I was hoping you have a moment so I can share an important message with you...**
My campaign manager, Sam Miller, is saying that we need to pick up the pace in these next few days.
**[Our goal is to have 200 individual donors step up over the next 72 hours. Can you be a part of this major, but necessary effort? All amounts support us in reaching our target!](https://act.myngp.com/el/R_1XtXL2HLWIAfzBrmIgye1IZt0P5BHDz5oPmZa58ps=/EIzX1a4iO5Du1gb8YLXIHn9lHkGE4PMBNQ7IndhYyQQ=?refcode=May-29-Voters-should-have-a-choice)**
Just the other week Republican Mario Diaz-Balart voted to cut food assistance programs to 60,000 households in Florida. He also has repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA), which provides millions of people access to affordable healthcare.
[**Voters should have a choice this election. Not politics as usual -- or the same old status quo. Please join us so we can make a real difference for people and families in the district. Become a team member TODAY by contributing as little as $5 or any amount you like.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/R_1XtXL2HLWIAfzBrmIgye1IZt0P5BHDz5oPmZa58ps=/EIzX1a4iO5Du1gb8YLXIHn9lHkGE4PMBNQ7IndhYyQQ=?refcode=May-29-Voters-should-have-a-choice&amount=5.00)
Remember, we only have 72 hours to get this done -- glad we have you onboard!
**\- Mary**

name: Anna Bukowski, tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Let me be clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is why we have to fight. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48993/c1f7015/684b306d/11436a7a/2469653289/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We've talked a bit about what's at stake this November -- but I want to share what exactly we mean by that. We have a challenger in this special election who's set on flipping this Senate seat from blue to red. Republican State Senator Karin Housley is a big Donald Trump supporter. But she goes even further than Trump: She's also a Big Pharma supporter. Her vote was one of only six "no" votes earlier this month on a bill that would hold opioid manufacturers responsible for the problem they helped create: the opioid epidemic. Hundreds of Minnesotans died of opioid overdoses in 2016, and half of those deaths involved prescription painkillers. Karin Housley is not interested in helping Minnesotans -- that much is clear. She's interested in lining the pockets of corporations like big pharmaceutical companies and opioid manufacturers. She will do exactly the same thing if she takes over this seat in November, and it's why we need to step up right now. [**This end-of-month deadline is a big one: We need to show Karin Housley and her Big Pharma friends that we're not backing down. Donate $10 or more now to help us raise $12,500 by midnight on Thursday.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48993/c1f7015/684b306d/11436a7a/2469653289/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48993/c1f7015/684b306d/11436a7b/2469653289/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Housley voted against a bipartisan effort to hold Big Pharma accountable for addressing the opioid epidemic and for misleading prescribers and patients to believe that opioids simply weren't addictive. Lawmakers from across the state stood up to demand that pharmaceutical companies be part of the solution, because waiting around is simply no longer an option.
We're facing an epidemic in this country where we're losing friends, neighbors, and loved ones every single day.
[**Karin Housley will keep putting corporate interests ahead of Minnesotans unless we elect Tina Smith this November -- chip in $10 or more today and let's end May stronger than ever.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48993/c1f7015/684b306d/11436a7a/2469653289/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Anna

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I couldn't have won without this community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c44f0/24c69fd9/1b5631b19/188e7405/42696229/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact&source=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact")
---

Peter,

My 2016 Senate election came down to 1,017 votes.

It remains a powerful reminder that everything you do in a campaign matters: every door knocked, every phone call made, every speech given, and certainly every dollar donated.

I would not have won in 2016 and turned a critical Senate seat blue without this community.

And now, even more women need that same level of tireless support -- including Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema, who are our best chances to turn the Senate blue. Their races are shaping up to be as close as mine was.

**[Donate $3 to help reach EMILY's List's $275,000 End-of-Month goal and help pro-choice Democratic women win some very close races this year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c44f0/24c69fd9/1b5631b19/188e7406/42696229/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180526_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+EMILYs+Lists+2750&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact&source=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact")**

EMILY's List has been there for me at every step of my political career.

When I ran for the New Hampshire state Senate, EMILY's List was there.

When I ran for governor, EMILY's List was there.

And when I ran for the U.S. Senate, EMILY's List was there.

In every fight, EMILY's List has been the difference for me just as it has been for so many other candidates.

And I am so inspired to see you step up and help more women win in 2018.

**Donate $3 to help reach EMILY's List's $275,000 End-of-Month goal and elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-May-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c44f0/24c69fd9/1b5631b19/188e7407/42696229/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180526_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachMayGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact&source=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact")**

Thank you.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan
U.S. Senator, New Hampshire

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c44f0/24c69fd9/1b5631b19/188e7400/42696229/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180526_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact&source=WQEFEQ66N_digital_email_20180529_EOMHassan_inact")**

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, My 2016 Senate election came down to 1,017 votes. It remains a powerful reminder that everything you do in a campaign matters: every door knocked, every phone call made, every speech given, and certainly every dollar donated. I would not have won in 2016 and turned a critical Senate seat blue without this community. And now, even more women need that same level of tireless support -- including Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema, who are our best chances to turn the Senate blue. Their races are shaping up to be as close as mine was. "" EMILY's List has been there for me at every step of my political career. When I ran for the New Hampshire state Senate, EMILY's List was there. When I ran for governor, EMILY's List was there. And when I ran for the U.S. Senate, EMILY's List was there. In every fight, EMILY's List has been the difference for me just as it has been for so many other candidates. And I am so inspired to see you step up and help more women win in 2018. Donate $3 to help reach EMILY's List's $275,000 End-of-Month goal and elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot this year: "" Thank you. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan U.S. Senator, New Hampshire "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. name: Tori Taylor
subject: Rep. Ted Budd (R-Payday Lenders)
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests
body:
|
---

| | Ted Budd is supposed to serve the people of North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. **Instead, he spends his time doing the bidding of special interests.** In a recent example of Rep. Budd's misplaced priorities, he is leading the charge to repeal consumer protections for working families against payday lenders (these types of predatory lending practices are actually illegal in North Carolina). These payday lenders prey on members of our military, seniors, and working families living paycheck to paycheck. [**_This is just more proof that Rep. Ted Budd needs to go. Make sure we have the resources to get Kathy elected -- give $5, $10, or more toward our $25,000 May goal._**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427840/e3b7d3/5cd80b30/2555b816/3347443980/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180529") Why would Rep. Budd choose payday lenders over North Carolina families? It might have something to do with the thousands of dollars in campaign contributions he's received from them. Rep. Ted Budd is bought and paid for by special interests. We know who calls the shots with him. **That 's why Kathy has taken a pledge to not take corporate PAC contributions.** She's not going to be beholden to special interests in Congress. She's going to answer to North Carolinians. There were plenty of people who didn't think we could make this a competitive race. They thought Budd was too entrenched, the district was too gerrymandered, there were too many outside interests stacked against us. **But they were wrong.** And we're continuing to show them every day, bit by bit, exactly how wrong they were. The people in this district are fed up with a representative who doesn't represent them. Together, we've built a campaign positioned for success. From making phone calls to grassroots contributions, you've been with us from the beginning and we're in this together: you, Kathy, me, our grassroots volunteers and supporters, and the hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians who are counting on us. **Make no mistake -- if we keep pushing, we can win in November. ** But we can't let up for a single second. [**_Missing goals is not an option. We only have another 72 hours to reach this one, so don't wait any longer. Give what you can._**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427840/e3b7d3/5cd80b30/2555b816/3347443980/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180529") Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| | Friends, I hope everyone ended up having a good weekend; and I am glad that we have avoided a potentially dangerous situation with Alberto - thus far. Sadly, my weekend itinerary was cancelled due to the threat posed by the inclement weather. The safety of my team, my supporters, and event attendees is always my main concern, and I will gladly err on the side caution every time. As of today, we have exactly one week until the primary election. Next Tuesday, June 5th, we ask that each of you head to the polls and have your voice be heard. We have some great people running for to represent our state in the U.S. Senate; and they are counting on us to show in a wave of blue support! This is a good indicator of where we (Democrats) stand in the general election as well. It is time we start putting action behind our resistance, and show the wave of force we are bringing to the midterms. Vote for who you want to win; not who you want to lose. Get Out To Vote - and let’s Flip It Blue, Mississippi! This week is a big week for the campaign as well! This coming Friday, June 1st, we will be opening our campaign headquarters in Biloxi. The office is located at 134 Rue Magnolia Street, Suite C. Stop by sometime, grab some literature, phone bank with us, or just stop in and tell us “Hi!” Primary election day (June 5th) we will be opening our Hattiesburg headquarters, AND we will be hosting a Watch Party that evening - as votes are tallied and the primary elections victors are decided. We hope that our Hub City supporters can join us as we await the news of who will be our opponent in November. Please, come by and join us at the Hattiesburg headquarters; located at 2018 Hardy Street. Upcoming events:ALA (American Legion Auxiliary) Magnolia Girls State - June 3-7 at The University of Southern Mississippi - Representative Anderson will be a guest speaker. Dates to Remember: Friday, June 1st \- Biloxi Headquarter Grand Opening Tuesday, June 5th \- PRIMARY ELECTION DAY 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. (note if you are in line at 7 p.m., you still have the right to place your vote - do not leave!) HATTIESBURG HEADQUARTER OPENING ELECTION NIGHT WATCH PARTY AT HATTIESBURG HQ 7-10 #Onward,Jeramey Anderson for Congress

clean_body: Friends, I hope everyone ended up having a good weekend; and I am glad that we have avoided a potentially dangerous situation with Alberto - | | | | | | | | | Friends, I hope everyone ended up having a good weekend; and I am glad that we have avoided a potentially dangerous situation with Alberto - thus far. Sadly, my weekend itinerary was cancelled due to the threat posed by the inclement weather. The safety of my team, my supporters, and event attendees is always my main concern, and I will gladly err on the side caution every time. As of today, we have exactly one week until the primary election. Next Tuesday, June 5th, we ask that each of you head to the polls and have your voice be heard. We have some great people running for to represent our state in the U.S. Senate; and they are counting on us to show in a wave of blue support! This is a good indicator of where we (Democrats) stand in the general election as well. It is time we start putting action behind our resistance, and show the wave of force we are bringing to the midterms. Vote for who you want to win; not who you want to lose. Get Out To Vote - and let’s Flip It Blue, Mississippi! This week is a big week for the campaign as well! This coming Friday, June 1st, we will be opening our campaign headquarters in Biloxi. The office is located at 134 Rue Magnolia Street, Suite C. Stop by sometime, grab some literature, phone bank with us, or just stop in and tell us “Hi!” Primary election day (June 5th) we will be opening our Hattiesburg headquarters, AND we will be hosting a Watch Party that evening - as votes are tallied and the primary elections victors are decided. We hope that our Hub City supporters can join us as we await the news of who will be our opponent in November. Please, come by and join us at the Hattiesburg headquarters; located at 2018 Hardy Street. Upcoming events:ALA (American Legion Auxiliary) Magnolia Girls State - June 3-7 at The University of Southern Mississippi - Representative Anderson will be a guest speaker. Dates to Remember: Friday, June 1st \- Biloxi Headquarter Grand Opening Tuesday, June 5th \- PRIMARY ELECTION DAY 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. (note if you are in line at 7 p.m., you still have the right to place your vote - do not leave!) HATTIESBURG HEADQUARTER OPENING ELECTION NIGHT WATCH PARTY AT HATTIESBURG HQ 7-10 #Onward,Jeramey Anderson for Congress | |

name: John Kasich
subject: Get this done!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
This issue has broad, bipartisan support in Congress and should
be a slam dunk victory for both sides of the aisle. And yet, they
do nothing.

Peter, another legislative
deadline looms and national attention will again turn to DACA
this week, largely because of Congress' inability to work
together to find solutions.

Roughly 800,000 young adults were
brought to this country as children and are threatened with
deportation to countries that will be foreign to them, and in
many instances, they will be sent to war-torn nations where they
will face very real dangers.

This issue has broad, bipartisan
support in Congress and should be a slam dunk victory for both
sides of the aisle. And yet, they're doing nothing.

Here are three ways you can help
us fight for a return of decency and compassion in our national
discussion:

1. Read my latest column from
Tuesday's USA Today and share it: "Time's Up Congress, Bypass GOP
Leaders and Get DACA Done for DREAMers"

2. Thursday is our critical May
fundraising deadline. The funds we raise go directly into paying
for the tools to get this message out and grow our team.

Please consider chipping in $25,
$50 or whatever you can before Thursday to help us hit our goal!

3. Take a look below at some of
the things I've been doing to drive Congress to take action and
protect these families.

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-John

P.S. If you'd like to chip in to
support our message, please consider making a generous donation
at: JohnKasich.com/Donate

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

| | Peter,

subject: "Billionaire Koch brothers take aim at Beto" (Houston Chronicle)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
**"In a tight race, billionaire Koch brothers take aim at Beto O'Rourke"**
_Houston Chronicle_ | May 25, 2018
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9217b/3b1d797/7dfacabc/35a84f0a/3088873263/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180529-EOM5&amount=3")**
Need 90 seconds, team,
First, without PAC money, we outraised Ted Cruz by more than double last quarter, allowing us to keep Beto on the road and visit county after county -- including 800 miles in a single weekend!
Then, all of your hard work proved successful with a new Quinnipiac poll showing us within three points of the junior senator -- calling it statistically tied and "too close to call."
**Now, a frustrated Ted Cruz is turning to the billionaire Koch brothers and their long lineup of special interests to play catch up at a time when it matters most.**
[**We can't let all of our hard-fought progress get erased by the Kochs. One critical way to make sure it doesn't is by hitting our end-of-month goal (we're a few thousand dollars short of it at the moment!). Pitch in a donation of $3 to help us reach this goal, fight back against the Kochs, and show our grassroots strength going into summer.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9217b/3b1d797/7dfacabc/35a84f0a/3088873263/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180529-EOM5&amount=3")

Team Beto

name: Keren, Campaign Manager | Tim Kaine 2018
subject: Long read: Campaign strategy update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

As May comes to an end and Election Day draws closer, I wanted to share an update on the state of this race. None of this is set in stone: We're less than six months away from Election Day, and a lot can change between now and November. [But as a member of this team it's important that you know what we're up against - and what it'll take for us to win.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13dc/3e0906/673b6c99/3e34c7bd/719564820/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+But+as+a+member+of+this+team+itrsquos+im&utm_campaign=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&source=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2")
* * *
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13dc/3e0906/673b6c99/3e34c7bc/719564820/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&source=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2")
[_Official State of the Race Update
May 29, 2018_](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13dc/3e0906/673b6c99/3e34c7b3/719564820/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Official+State+of+the+Race+Update%0A%09May+2&utm_campaign=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&source=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2") **_WHY OUR RACE MATTERS:_**

The entire nation will have its eyes on Virginia on Election Night.

Our Commonwealth sent a huge message in 2017 by electing Democrats in every corner of Virginia, and people will be watching to see if we can sustain the blue wave you started last year - _or if Republicans are now more motivated than we are._

**_OUR OPPONENTS:_**

Republicans have vowed to do _everything_ in their power to defeat Tim Kaine in November.
* The NRA has already endorsed one of the people running to take on Tim in November.
* Another one of our opponents has promised to run the dirtiest campaign possible against us.
* We already know that the winner of the Republican primary will be someone who'll work to undo all the progress Virginia has made.

**_OUR POLLING:_**

I won't sugarcoat this: The latest polls aren't great.

**A recent Morning Consult poll showed that Republicans are _just three points_ behind us** \- and we know from experience how quickly that gap could close.

**_OUR STRATEGY:_**

Right now, we're focused on a handful of core things:
* Competing in every corner of Virginia,
* Engaging with new voters,
* Helping people get more involved in their community,
* And spreading our message to every Virginian.

Local campaign offices are open all across the Commonwealth, and our organizers are on the ground registering voters, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and recruiting volunteers to make Team Kaine even stronger.

These organizers and volunteers are laying the foundation for Democratic victories up and down the ticket in November, **and every dollar we raise helps secure more resources for them to do this important work.**

That's why it's so important that we reach our goal before the end of the month: Your donations are going directly into making our field program stronger, fighting back against Republican attacks, and making sure that three-point polling advantage doesn't get any narrower.

And it's important we get these resources from YOU. Small dollar donations made by grassroots supporters are the bricks that build this campaign. **And every small amount,_every dime,_ helps us build something stronger:**

[Please, chip in any amount you can right now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13dc/3e0906/673b6c99/3e34c7b2/719564820/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Please+chip+in+any+amount+you+can+right+&utm_campaign=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&source=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2")

Thank you for being a part of Team Kaine,

_Keren_

Keren Charles Dongo
Campaign Manager
Kaine for Virginia 2018 | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13dc/3e0906/673b6c99/3e34c7b1/719564820/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2&source=20180529_1_FR_KCD_EOM-2")

Another one of our opponents has promised to run the dirtiest campaign possible against us. We already know that the winner of the Republican primary will be someone who'll work to undo all the progress Virginia has made. OUR POLLING: I won't sugarcoat this: The latest polls aren't great. A recent Morning Consult poll showed that Republicans are just three points behind us \- and we know from experience how quickly that gap could close. OUR STRATEGY: Right now, we're focused on a handful of core things: Competing in every corner of Virginia, Engaging with new voters, Helping people get more involved in their community, And spreading our message to every Virginian. Local campaign offices are open all across the Commonwealth, and our organizers are on the ground registering voters, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and recruiting volunteers to make Team Kaine even stronger. These organizers and volunteers are laying the foundation for Democratic victories up and down the ticket in November, and every dollar we raise helps secure more resources for them to do this important work. That's why it's so important that we reach our goal before the end of the month: Your donations are going directly into making our field program stronger, fighting back against Republican attacks, and making sure that three-point polling advantage doesn't get any narrower. And it's important we get these resources from YOU. Small dollar donations made by grassroots supporters are the bricks that build this campaign. And every small amount,every dime, helps us build something stronger: "" Thank you for being a part of Team Kaine, Keren Keren Charles Dongo Campaign Manager Kaine for Virginia 2018 | "" "" * | "" "" ""

| | | | "Ryan-linked group raised $24.6M from anonymous donor." \-- Politico, 5/18/2018
---
This is exhibit A in why our campaign finance system is utterly broken and stacked in favor of billionaire, activist donors.
Nearly $25 million was given to Paul Ryan by one donor and we don't even know who the donor is. But we do know where their money is going: **to defeat Democrats like Ann in competitive House districts.**
A recent poll had Republicans surging nationwide ahead of Democrats. Their momentum is being powered by anonymous donors like the one mentioned above who are helping GOP outside groups break fundraising records.
If we don't step up and hit our goals, they could crush any hope we have of flipping this seat. Our deadline is in two days and we still need to raise $5,329 before then.

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Single-Payer For America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sp_healthcare&n=1)
---
Friend -- For years, while the cost of healthcare has been skyrocketing for Americans around the country, our elected officials have sat around “gathering information” instead of taking a stand in support of a single-payer healthcare system. What those establishment politicians won’t tell you is that “gathering information” means they are checking in with their big donors, PACs, and investment advisors to see if they will be able to profit as much from a system that actually works FOR the people. Richard has been clear throughout this entire campaign that he will not accept money from PACs who want to dictate to him what policies are good for the American people. Instead, he will listen to his constituents saying with a resounding voice that they want single-payer healthcare. Consumers want single-payer. Small business owners want single-payer. Doctors and nurses want single-payer. Insurance companies, drug companies and medical device companies do not want single-payer. While the American people are working two or three jobs to afford life-saving medical treatments, the establishment politicians and donors in the healthcare industry are abusing their power to line their pockets instead of helping the American people. Is that the kind of leadership you want? If you want a Senator who promises to work extensively to implement a single-payer healthcare system that works for you, rather than against you, join our fight and support Richard Painter to become Senator of Minnesota. [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sp_healthcare&n=2)
Painter For Minnesota
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sp_healthcare&n=3)

name: U.S. Rep. Pramila Jayapal
subject: Unfortunately, I was right:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
There are so many ways to fight back against the many different outrages of the Trump administration, but there's one way to fight back against all of them at once:
---
Derek --

I was elected to Congress on the same day Donald Trump was elected president.

I didn't quite know what to expect from our new president and his party -- but I knew whatever they were going to do, it was going to be bad. Unfortunately, I was right about that part. I can tell you that what the Trump administration and this Republican Congress are doing is even more destructive and harmful to our country and democracy than the news makes it look.

There are several ways to fight back against the many different outrages of the Trump administration, but there's one way to fight back against all of them at once: put Democrats in the majority so we can take on this administration every single day.

**The DNC faces an important fundraising deadline Thursday -- so now is the time to make your first donation of 2018. Contribute $3 now:**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c680/3749657952/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pj-may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c681/3749657952/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pj-may-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c68e/3749657952/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pj-may-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c68f/3749657952/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pj-may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c68c/3749657952/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pj-may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c68d/3749657952/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")
** Who we elect to office this year will decide whether we make progress on the issues impacting millions of Americans today -- and by supporting candidates of all backgrounds, we'll ensure that our communities are truly represented at all levels of government.

I'm proud to see the record number of women and people of color who are running for office this year. The DNC is working hard to elect these diverse voices so our country's representation can be a true reflection of its people and their values.

Democrats know that every vote in every election counts -- and to win this November, we must knock on doors, mobilize, and organize in every community. That's just what the DNC is doing with the IWillVote campaign, planning to reach 50 million Americans across the country by Election Day. You and I need to help them hit that ambitious goal.

**[The DNC is up against a big fundraising deadline and I'm counting on you to support the party's efforts to get out the vote. If you're committed to making sure that every voice counts, donate $3 for the first time in 2018 today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c68a/3749657952/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+The+DNC+is+up+against+a+big+fundraising+&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")**

Thank you for taking action,

Pramila Jayapal
U.S. Representative, WA-07

P.S. If you're sick and tired of what's happening in this administration, I've got an answer for you: elect more Democrats. **[Before Thursday's deadline, contribute $3 to support Democrats running in competitive races nationwide.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c68b/3749657952/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Before+Thursdays+deadline+contribute++if&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep")**

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522eab/4067b0a/5ad062d34/7e46c689/3749657952/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180529_pj_rep&source=em_20180529_pj_rep&refcode=em_20180529_pj_rep"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: There are so many ways to fight back against the many different outrages of the Trump administration, but there's one way to fight back against all of them at once: Derek -- I was elected to Congress on the same day Donald Trump was elected president. I didn't quite know what to expect from our new president and his party -- but I knew whatever they were going to do, it was going to be bad. Unfortunately, I was right about that part. I can tell you that what the Trump administration and this Republican Congress are doing is even more destructive and harmful to our country and democracy than the news makes it look. There are several ways to fight back against the many different outrages of the Trump administration, but there's one way to fight back against all of them at once: put Democrats in the majority so we can take on this administration every single day. The DNC faces an important fundraising deadline Thursday -- so now is the time to make your first donation of 2018. Contribute $3 now: "" "" "" "" "" "" Who we elect to office this year will decide whether we make progress on the issues impacting millions of Americans today -- and by supporting candidates of all backgrounds, we'll ensure that our communities are truly represented at all levels of government. I'm proud to see the record number of women and people of color who are running for office this year. The DNC is working hard to elect these diverse voices so our country's representation can be a true reflection of its people and their values. Democrats know that every vote in every election counts -- and to win this November, we must knock on doors, mobilize, and organize in every community. That's just what the DNC is doing with the IWillVote campaign, planning to reach 50 million Americans across the country by Election Day. You and I need to help them hit that ambitious goal. "" Thank you for taking action, Pramila Jayapal U.S. Representative, WA-07 P.S. If you're sick and tired of what's happening in this administration, I've got an answer for you: elect more Democrats. "" Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jessica Morse
subject: How you can help one week from #ElectionDay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzjIE6KY0nbWOe8o6VadhAdSxt0l-eEql1huHQM__cU=/kMjtuiJwUKF98a_aKAkQN19-sxUTXMSokwEcKINzNLs=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180529_JM_ttv_all_logo)
Hi friends,
I've been out knocking on doors nearly every day of this campaign. I love talking to voters!
People usually open the door skeptically, expecting me to be peddling solar panels and instead, I put out my hand and say, "I'm Jessica Morse. I'm running for Congress." And (usually) they light up. Most of our neighbors have never had a congressional candidate come to their door.
With just one week before Election Day and with ballots already mailed, I need to be out talking to voters as much as possible. But, my campaign also needs me to keep raising money so we have the resources necessary to communicate our message--and so I can beat Tom McClintock in the fall. Unfortunately, I haven't yet figured out how to be two places at once--and that's where this team comes in.
**My fundraising goal is to raise $2,000 per day --or $14,000 in total before Tuesday's primary. Those are the resources we need to run a winning operation. If this team can help me hit that goal, I can spend more time talking to voters and less time raising money.**
[_**Can you chip in so I can focus 100% on talking to voters and we can win this?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzjIE6KY0nbWOe8o6VadhAdSxt0l-eEql1huHQM__cU=/kMjtuiJwUKF98a_aKAkQN19-sxUTXMSokwEcKINzNLs=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180529_JM_ttv_all_l1)
When I meet people at their doors, some have seen our ads on TV, gotten our mailers or heard about our campaign from a volunteer or neighbor. Some--like the woman who peeked at me through her curtain skeptically before I saw a flash of recognition and heard her cry, "Jessica!"--are excited to meet me. That's always fun.
Most appreciate the chance to talk about their health care costs or economic concerns, while others are just starting to tune into the election and have questions--like the woman who chatted with me for a few minutes before running to grab a mail piece she got from another campaign. She said, "I like you, but I don't understand this." I was glad for the opportunity to set the record straight, and I think she was glad for the conversation as well.
Talking to neighbors, fire chiefs, hospital boards, and voters across our community inspired me to run--and it's how we'll win!
[_**So, chip in right now, and help me spend more time talking to voters.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzjIE6KY0nbWOe8o6VadhAdSxt0l-eEql1huHQM__cU=/kMjtuiJwUKF98a_aKAkQN19-sxUTXMSokwEcKINzNLs=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180529_JM_ttv_all_l2)
Thank you,
Jessica
P.S. Have you signed up to knock on your neighbors' doors yet? [_**If not, sign up for a shift now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzjIE6KY0nbWOe8o6VadhAdSxt0l-eEql1huHQM__cU=/PqodCLFxNtLKgtLbHL_QDhr775rSbjhDPSe_H3zI7Js=)
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzjIE6KY0nbWOe8o6VadhAdSxt0l-eEql1huHQM__cU=/kMjtuiJwUKF98a_aKAkQN19-sxUTXMSokwEcKINzNLs=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180529_JM_ttv_all_contribbutton)
---

Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.

Jessica Morse for Congress
1079 Sunrise Ave

Roseville CA 95611 United States

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Hope you had a restful weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
On June 1 last year, President Trump pulled out of the Paris agreement.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79078/2f5ea88d/712f77ba/2cbcc696/3669308988/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-3-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I hope you had a restful Memorial Day weekend. Many members of my staff took advantage of our national holiday to explore our beautiful Washington parks. I was able to spend some quality time with my family enjoying our wonderful outdoors. The weather was close to perfect! I know Tracy messaged you last week about our upcoming deadline at midnight on May 31\. It's a big one -- $30k is a lot to raise this month, but it's what we need to power the progressive movement here in Washington state and beyond. [**I'm also taking a moment to reflect on what happened on Jun e 1 last year, and why the work we do matters so much.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79078/2f5ea88d/712f77ba/2cbcc696/3669308988/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-3-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") It's one year since President Trump abruptly yanked the United States from the Paris Climate Accord. His rash act isolated America from an agreement by the community of nations to work together to combat climate change. The president's decision not only placed the stunning natural resources and pristine environment of our state and nation at significant risk, it compromised the future of our planet for generations to come. Here, in Washington state, we are filling the vacuum of leadership on climate change vacated by the Trump administration. The United States Climate Alliance, a group I formed with 16 other states and territories, is working with countries across the world to make sure we adhere to the standards set forth in the Paris agreement. We will not surrender the environmental future of our nation or world simply to satisfy a narrow-minded political agenda. [**We need you to make sure we can still do that. Will you donate right now to recognize the anniversary of a terrible foreign policy and climate decision -- and to make sure we never let this happen again?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79078/2f5ea88d/712f77ba/2cbcc696/3669308988/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-3-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79078/2f5ea88d/712f77ba/2cbcc696/3669308988/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-29_eom-3-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-3-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79078/2f5ea88d/712f77ba/2cbcc695/3669308988/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: We are doing this for liberty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, this is not a normal campaign. Most campaigns for Senate often go something like this... Mitch McConnell and the GOP establishment find and groom a candidate for office. That candidate then pledges to support the leadership’s agenda. Once they have pledged their eternal and blind loyalty, McConnell introduces that candidate to big and well-connected donors. Mitch McConnell gets another puppet and the voters don’t even realize it. Often, this process is quite profitable for the candidate as they enrich themselves while in office. ... Not Austin Petersen. Austin is running for the Senate to uproot the establishment and put an end to our INSANE spending and misguided monetary & foreign policies. Austin was inspired to get involved in the liberty movement in 2008 when Ron Paul ran for President. He is running to restore our Bill of rights and join Rand Paul as a champion of the Constitution in the U.S. Senate. [**Friend, I would like to invite you to join our campaign by making your first online donation.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D052918_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_nondonor&n=1) Let’s be honest with each other. It takes money to operate a campaign, and Austin isn’t cashing checks from well connected Wall Street types, D.C. insiders, or big PACs. His campaign is funded by donations from folks like you and me who care deeply about our country and want to see him succeed. Austin needs your support to win. [**Do you think you can donate $5, $10, $20.18, $50, or even $100 today? You can click here donate any amount that you can.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D052918_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_nondonor&n=2) Our goal is to find 1,000 online donors by the end of the month. Austin and I are hoping that you can donate. I will let Austin know when you have made a donation! Thank you so much. Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---

([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052918_nondonor&n=3))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

body:
May was full of tough news for Arizona Democrats. So I'm not exaggerating when I say that the pressure is higher than ever to beat our monthly grassroots fundraising goal.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6339ad/1a8421e1/1a41ca1db/4b366b35/2453643256/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
