Team, We have another big grassroots fundraising deadline coming up on Thursday at midnight, and I'm not exaggerating when I say that the pressure is higher than ever to beat it [_**(you can chip in right now to make sure we do).**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.29_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") May was full of tough news for Arizona Democrats: **Tom was named THE most endangered Democrat _in the entire House_** , we learned that Joe Arpaio's Senate campaign is gaining steam -- and one of our far-right opponents compared women's reproductive health care to the Holocaust. We can't let the far-right win, team, but we won't re-elect Tom if we don't meet our fundraising goals. [**The pressure is on: Can you make a donation RIGHT NOW to make sure we end May with some good news?**](http://action.tomohalleran. Here at Team O'Halleran, we're working overtime to make sure the bad news from earlier this month doesn't stop our momentum. We're proud of Tom's record as an independent voice for Arizona families, and we're confident that we can win this race and keep him serving us in Washington.

But when you're named THE most endangered House Democrat, you really can't take anything for granted. [**Help us beat our goal on Thursday with a donation today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.29_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Lindsay Coleman
Finance Director

name: Greg Pence
subject: the race starts now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
It’s a privilege and honor to be your Sixth Congressional District Republican nominee. As a Marine, I understand that respect is earned, never given.. | | [](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=3a72a4f03679486dad5fa4b00608cb90&_e=eGk1wMVh7aOUY_ToWcIwAB5e5YfP5iZyO7xPTd2lBop659NfHPEFoQZ7R7eGbpDc0Y2ZN1iGHSNTcj-0p8tTS_FIc-EV2wAvfdDoCFJFwXVn0cMQQmkOTw-S0fIGd8IyQPf_8QF2RXt-2-V_gjHCX0s6cqEDss_N9YbnfCCNQccNTcX_ZEYyR5Ej_bR1L9n1kLSJtWWKk1wve1rHoaVe8Q4c9fjxqa6A5DU10nE-CK_tUNswwgUf8D1-pAxkq2-uP_OWzmS_1xkeD4ybk0C5flwch_5F66M0bX6O1tnomd_fspqX0jJj7B4ckmchsSFyf6A-L3NTBk0uIcMWZmfielPiPQbxaT2sVr460-mJSAMghmJgPv5ilmOASoL6D-6QRZer4flUpCragu22P8gSvLQNZgr8X-cPy7gulQramAA%3D) |

|

_It’s a privilege and honor to be your Sixth Congressional District Republican nominee._

**As a Marine, I understand that respect is earned, never given. Team Pence will continue to run a grassroots-focused campaign because talking directly to you, the voters of the Sixth District, is all that matters.**

Our race is only half over.

**[Help us keep up our incredible momentum by donating $18 now>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=3a72a4f03679486dad5fa4b00608cb90&_e=eGk1wMVh7aOUY_ToWcIwAB5e5YfP5iZyO7xPTd2lBop659NfHPEFoQZ7R7eGbpDc0Y2ZN1iGHSNTcj-0p8tTS_FIc-EV2wAvfdDoCFJFwXVn0cMQQmkOTw-S0fIGd8IyQPf_8QF2RXt-2-V_gjHCX0s6cqEDss_N9YbnfCCNQccNTcX_ZEYyR5Ej_bR1L9n1kLSJtWWKk1wve1rHoaVe8a7wGDr5hc9-QKYhXlsKGtbkXu-jspJgOCYjn7eVEveughab9ljf_y9dVrIlBU4OYgStjmJHS2fRGbbuJ4_v59dyMAfqm-bPPC5xVPDHezJRoHxPqVsPUsxtYZQ4xXxm-a6ITlkY0Os2J0VhDLHvY14t_6ubXw6pG-dTqUSl-D5HR48yTe-bxMxlu-7jrFkSAWjpSeYUh9BH4JBv7JxTE9Q%3D)**

_As a veteran Marine officer, I’m ready to fight to get things done in Washington, but I can’t accomplish my Hoosier-First agenda without your support._

Just as our primary victory was fueled by Team Pence grassroots conservatives, so will a victory this November – that’s why we can’t slow down now.

**[Chip in $18 to spread the word to Hoosiers about how we will continue the Sixth District’s strong tradition of leadership>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=3a72a4f03679486dad5fa4b00608cb90&_e=eGk1wMVh7aOUY_ToWcIwAB5e5YfP5iZyO7xPTd2lBop659NfHPEFoQZ7R7eGbpDc0Y2ZN1iGHSNTcj-0p8tTS_FIc-EV2wAvfdDoCFJFwXVn0cMQQmkOTw-S0fIGd8IyQPf_8QF2RXt-2-V_gjHCX0s6cqEDss_N9YbnfCCNQccNTcX_ZEYyR5Ej_bR1L9n1kLSJtWWKk1wve1rHoaVe8W9JbV2g0KlSatr_Qy_0MHZUjM6rEn1hEYhmAjI_sxBgy8q56B26GadaszT0XD2VVhTbLAupuLztRvDOIdXYyjGILRjZWDN2qWltY4rTzTGC_y0qOJqW0WZ-sK582i7xsAb8ULwjaHyYHlMgff_1HPUlvM6bxjXRzLZ3OiBcaC1ibI4HfxCOAe0gZ-E6plYQwqNGTnsXhTDl9HSFzpi46ZQ%3D)**

**_With just over 5 months until Election Day, it’s critical that we build the resources now to keep up our momentum and ensure victory in November._**

**We’re setting a $10,000 May End of Month Fundraising Goal, and we’re reaching out to dedicated members of Team Pence like you who helped fuel our HUGE primary victory.**

**[Donate any amount to help us take our fight to the Democrats and show Washington that we stand with President Trump and Vice President Pence>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=3a72a4f03679486dad5fa4b00608cb90&_e=eGk1wMVh7aOUY_ToWcIwAB5e5YfP5iZyO7xPTd2lBop659NfHPEFoQZ7R7eGbpDc0Y2ZN1iGHSNTcj-0p8tTS_FIc-EV2wAvfdDoCFJFwXVn0cMQQmkOTw-S0fIGd8IyQPf_8QF2RXt-2-V_gjHCX0s6cqEDss_N9YbnfCCNQccNTcX_ZEYyR5Ej_bR1L9n1kLSJtWWKk1wve1rHoaVe8Sr6onPx7atkr-1KEZYjJLgo-AfMSWTucgokyzAtlRvMRf-a-zwzx8KKMBwYsCXRzUF54N1yvVxNsNCwUqYaCQFce0ouANPbnWgzrxCzf5Wv07gXq9hdfjgYgG_Jv3Vnd09bBoUiZNO7L3kdccwdII7XuwYRL8xLHFjGMzfpITwmSlXdgDI2p5630HTCngRdRXeWy8bTrzYvnuQ5dt4B8s8%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg Pence

** _P.S._ Any amount you can chip in toward our fundraising goal now is critical to our success in November. Here is a safe and secure link where you can donate: [https://secure.gregpenceforcongress.com/action-309698/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=3a72a4f03679486dad5fa4b00608cb90&_e=eGk1wMVh7aOUY_ToWcIwAB5e5YfP5iZyO7xPTd2lBop659NfHPEFoQZ7R7eGbpDc0Y2ZN1iGHSNTcj-0p8tTS_FIc-EV2wAvfdDoCFJFwXVn0cMQQmkOTw-S0fIGd8IyQPf_8QF2RXt-2-V_gjHCX0s6cqEDss_N9YbnfCCNQccNTcX_ZEYyR5Ej_bR1L9n1kLSJtWWKk1wve1rHoaVe8a3ugdeFftVi-ubv7hTHbNzRKZMtjgaH3Ivc8-iCaYQF_LOgmdVaO5Q6abs0oDdX69mYLKrsM4M1LMfSCDdgYfFs1yPGUqWIbtP0YeGb-sX0ELBUpb2bveZGPYvKSaHc61VjryybT9ny07pN9xdUb4cF8jnLnASJ92X2IDR4NJ6nDSgFcRqdkSrmpoRpNGANVoUJC3PiA4ak8Y-CZVQ0ZW4%3D)**

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Just a few days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

We're just a few days away from our state party's convention in Rochester, Minnesota where we'll pick our candidates for the 2018 election.

We're gathering at a critical time for our country, with big choices on the ballot this November. Will we come together to take action and combat climate change? Will we protect our elections from foreign influence? Will we stand up to the pharmaceutical companies and take steps to lower drug prices?

The convention begins Friday, and we need to show Minnesotans that we're ready to take on the big issues for them. **Before I get to Rochester, can I count on you to contribute towards our $30,000 pre-convention goal and help me continue working for all Minnesotans?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Thank you,

Amy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW Vol. 2
body:
Governor Scott is Fighting to Strengthen Public Education | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/things-you-need-to-know-vol-2?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW Vol. 2** **THE BUDGET AND PROPERTY TAX DEBATE** _Governor Scott Fighting to Strengthen Public Education_ **_VS._** _Legislative Majority Defending a Broken Funding System Driving Unsustainable Costs and Growing Inequality_ Governor Scott believes good, responsible government can solve big problems and get amazing results when leaders have the courage to rethink the way we’ve always done things, challenge special interest lobbyists, and put progress ahead of politics. The Governor cares deeply about quality and equity in education. He knows we have to break the cycle of ever-rising tax rates and growing inequality between schools that is denying opportunities to our kids and hurting our economy. That’s why he’s fighting for real reform! Here are the _Things You Need to Know_ about why Governor Scott is fighting to reform education and provide property tax relief: _GOVERNOR SCOTT HAS THE COURAGE TO SAY TOO MUCH MONEY IS BEING DIVERTED AWAY FROM OUR CHILDREN_
* Every year more and more of the investment we are making – money that should be used to provide more and better opportunities for our kids – is being consumed by an old and inefficient delivery model.
* We are educating nearly 30,000 fewer students than we were 20 years ago, and we continue to lose about three kids each day from our preK-12 system, with no end to this downward trend in sight.
* Vermont’s financial commitment to education is the highest in the country. In the 2015-2016 school year, Vermont’s per pupil expenditure was $23,557 – over $2,000 more per pupil than New York (which spent the second most)[_[1]_](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=205a5bc2bc&e=19cebfe173). The national average is about $12,000 per pupil.
* For too many years, the State has increased property tax rates, often faster than Vermonters’ ability to pay. In fact, over the last few years, education spending has been rising faster than healthcare costs, even though use of healthcare is increasing and use of the K-12 education system is decreasing by about 3 kids each day.
* Our student-to-staff ratio has decreased from about 7 kids for every adult in our schools in 1997 to about 4 kids for every 1 adult in our schools in 2017.

_GOVERNOR SCOTT HAS THE COURAGE TO SAY THE CURRENT SYSTEM IS EXPANDING INEQUALITY BETWEEN SCHOOLS_
* Most Vermonters would be willing to accept spending more on each pupil than any other state - and even increasing that investment each year - if we were steadily expanding opportunities and improving outcomes for our kids. That, unfortunately, is not yet the case. That is why Governor Scott is fighting for the very best education system in the country.
* As tax rates rise every year, many communities - particularly those already struggling under the growing crisis of affordability and demographic trends - watch as their school boards make difficult choices to reduce programming and enrichment activities to sustain core academic offerings, even as total spending and tax rates both go up.
* As a result - contrary to the claims of union insiders and former state officials who failed to address this problem- the gap between the “haves” and the “have nots” is growing. We have some schools offering a wide range of foreign languages, cutting-edge science, technology and engineering classes. Not to mention, sports, drama and music programs. And we have other schools that can’t offer any of these opportunities.

_GOVERNOR SCOTT HAS THE COURAGE TO OFFER A REAL PLAN TO ADDRESS THESE FACTS_
* [_At his weekly press conference_](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8ca592dc2c&e=19cebfe173) last Thursday, the Governor clearly identified the challenge and the opportunity.
* “At least we're trying something (to address tax rates and invest in improving quality)," the Governor told reporters, noting that the Legislature hasn’t come up with any sort of plan to increase quality, reduce inequality and address property tax rates!
* As you know, Governor Scott [_has put forward a comprehensive plan_](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=428fb6e075&e=19cebfe173) that:
* Fully funds school budgets approved in March;
* Prevents statewide property tax rates from rising by $33 million this year;
* Stabilizes statewide property tax rates for 5 years; and
* Generates hundreds of millions of dollars in savings that could be used to reduce the growing inequality between our schools, increasing opportunities for kids and even lowering tax rates in future years.

_THE LEGISLATIVE MAJORITY WANTS THE STATUS QUO_
* The Legislature’s leadership proposes to keep doing what they’ve been doing, so Vermont can keep getting what it’s been getting.
* Their plan is to:
* Raise property taxes $33.4 million this year and $200+ million over the next 5-year;
* Refuse to reform the education system, meaning less money into kids;
* Continue the persistent inequality between our schools;
* Complain the Governor is being unreasonable; and
* Blame the Governor and try to make him look bad.

---
| _IT’S TIME TO MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD & TELL THE LEGISLATURE TO HAVE THE COURAGE TO DO THE RIGHT THING_ If you support Governor Scott’s courageous efforts, **sign this petition** asking them to _stop_ the unnecessary tax hikes and _start_ working with the Governor to make our education system the best in the nation!
---

clean_body: Governor Scott is Fighting to Strengthen Public Education | | | | | | THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW Vol. 2 THE BUDGET AND PROPERTY TAX DEBATE Governor Scott Fighting to Strengthen Public Education VS. Legislative Majority Defending a Broken Funding System Driving Unsustainable Costs and Growing Inequality Governor Scott believes good, responsible government can solve big problems and get amazing results when leaders have the courage to rethink the way we’ve always done things, challenge special interest lobbyists, and put progress ahead of politics. The Governor cares deeply about quality and equity in education. He knows we have to break the cycle of ever-rising tax rates and growing inequality between schools that is denying opportunities to our kids and hurting our economy. That’s why he’s fighting for real reform! Here are the Things You Need to Know about why Governor Scott is fighting to reform education and provide property tax relief: GOVERNOR SCOTT HAS THE COURAGE TO SAY TOO MUCH MONEY IS BEING DIVERTED AWAY FROM OUR CHILDREN Every year more and more of the investment we are making – money that should be used to provide more and better opportunities for our kids – is being consumed by an old and inefficient delivery model. We are educating nearly 30,000 fewer students than we were 20 years ago, and we continue to lose about three kids each day from our preK-12 system, with no end to this downward trend in sight. Vermont’s financial commitment to education is the highest in the country. In the 2015-2016 school year, Vermont’s per pupil expenditure was $23,557 – over $2,000 more per pupil than New York (which spent the second most)[[1]](). The national average is about $12,000 per pupil. For too many years, the State has increased property tax rates, often faster than Vermonters’ ability to pay. In fact, over the last few years, education spending has been rising faster than healthcare costs, even though use of healthcare is increasing and use of the K-12 education system is decreasing by about 3 kids each day. Our student-to-staff ratio has decreased from about 7 kids for every adult in our schools in 1997 to about 4 kids for every 1 adult in our schools in 2017. GOVERNOR SCOTT HAS THE COURAGE TO SAY THE CURRENT SYSTEM IS EXPANDING INEQUALITY BETWEEN SCHOOLS Most Vermonters would be willing to accept spending more on each pupil than any other state - and even increasing that investment each year - if we were steadily expanding opportunities and improving outcomes for our kids. That, unfortunately, is not yet the case. That is why Governor Scott is fighting for the very best education system in the country. As tax rates rise every year, many communities - particularly those already struggling under the growing crisis of affordability and demographic trends - watch as their school boards make difficult choices to reduce programming and enrichment activities to sustain core academic offerings, even as total spending and tax rates both go up. As a result - contrary to the claims of union insiders and former state officials who failed to address this problem- the gap between the “haves” and the “have nots” is growing. We have some schools offering a wide range of foreign languages, cutting-edge science, technology and engineering classes. Not to mention, sports, drama and music programs. And we have other schools that can’t offer any of these opportunities. GOVERNOR SCOTT HAS THE COURAGE TO OFFER A REAL PLAN TO ADDRESS THESE FACTS last Thursday, the Governor clearly identified the challenge and the opportunity. “At least we're trying something (to address tax rates and invest in improving quality)," the Governor told reporters, noting that the Legislature hasn’t come up with any sort of plan to increase quality, reduce inequality and address property tax rates! As you know, Governor Scott that: Fully funds school budgets approved in March; Prevents statewide property tax rates from rising by $33 million this year; Stabilizes statewide property tax rates for 5 years; and Generates hundreds of millions of dollars in savings that could be used to reduce the growing inequality between our schools, increasing opportunities for kids and even lowering tax rates in future years. THE LEGISLATIVE MAJORITY WANTS THE STATUS QUO The Legislature’s leadership proposes to keep doing what they’ve been doing, so Vermont can keep getting what it’s been getting. Their plan is to: Raise property taxes $33.4 million this year and $200+ million over the next 5-year; Refuse to reform the education system, meaning less money into kids; Continue the persistent inequality between our schools; Complain the Governor is being unreasonable; and Blame the Governor and try to make him look bad. | IT’S TIME TO MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD & TELL THE LEGISLATURE TO HAVE THE COURAGE TO DO THE RIGHT THING If you support Governor Scott’s courageous efforts, sign this petition asking them to stop the unnecessary tax hikes and start working with the Governor to make our education system the best in the nation! | "SIGN THE PETITION" | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer, P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4435/24c69fd9/1b69e3380/188e6640/454618057/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ65N_digital_email_20180529_MayEOMSRec_inact&source=WQEFEQ65N_digital_email_20180529_MayEOMSRec_inact")
---

Peter,

Super Tuesday 2018 is ONE WEEK away.

It's our single biggest primary Election Day of the year. We have 46 women with primaries from coast to coast. Plus there's a special election to turn a Missouri state Senate district blue.

And our May End-of-Month goal is our last fundraising deadline before the big day. It's our last chance to show strong support for these women before their names are on the ballot.

So I took a look at our supporter records to see where everyone stands for the 2018 cycle, Peter. Here's what I have down for this email address:
**2018 Cycle Donor:** Not yet
**Suggested Action:** **[Donate $3 to help reach our $275,000 End-of-Month goal and support all 47 of our women on the ballot on Super Tuesday.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4435/24c69fd9/1b69e3380/188e6642/454618057/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180526_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+if+consinConsGroup9225+Donate+again++els&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ65N_digital_email_20180529_MayEOMSRec_inact&source=WQEFEQ65N_digital_email_20180529_MayEOMSRec_inact")**
We've had some tremendous wins in May, when there were elections _three weeks in a row._

Two of our House candidates in Texas runoffs won. Now they have to defeat incumbent Republicans in November. And our two House candidates in Georgia advanced to runoffs.

We helped Stacey Abrams -- who could be the first black woman governor -- win her primary election, too, and helped all five of our state and local candidates in Georgia advance.

_We can keep going._

To support our 47 candidates on the ballot on Super Tuesday, it'll take everyone stepping up so we can smash our End-of-Month goal and make it happen.

**Donate $3 toward our $275,000 goal and help elect pro-choice Democratic women on Super Tuesday:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-May-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4435/24c69fd9/1b69e3380/188e667c/454618057/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180526_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachMayGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ65N_digital_email_20180529_MayEOMSRec_inact&source=WQEFEQ65N_digital_email_20180529_MayEOMSRec_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

body:
Missourians demanded accountability and trust

GREITENS RESIGNS EFFECTIVE FRIDAY, JUNE 1](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCdE77UTiG7PBzEI1F3wbLYb2OiJK3-Da9prFeEkL6daiNgpz38McDV2HL-FPqNwzyVEx0canVHYlZM3UJ0XwuX6alIDzgO0TTf07Qp857_cfEMPFwXq6gXQgUJG4PTUwr-XW07mXnbzlvn3f3wNUVjO6cia31mRpKJ8wrzGQxxhH8tSgu-4s7JXgohk6fEpO-cRX3Q_aY7iaLsn5oo0hXrQ0sBDB1e4sRLUyOvWn_9Bl006nNhXcdB1VI_0KfV7gTesYpucE9j5ebaTjRIxrCBaDeC_ZSO4RgnEUq0uar4Ty0NBT1oBkkavUkMdVnCeOKOnyYjnV4iA4xxymIjuBIsmgRvgBJfnlFVTZYyNYCJFnQyEoc382dDOCNBm65EJnx0Pjv91-Aqt1ICztXy40tJ8jacxot8p&c=7Xng7uyU6snLbsUngYK47GeJ8_6tFoCN-1_O1PWuJVmwzXU6pI557Q==&ch=yh8tSIoDLceUIi5CUc5ZUx5VevhQorloyn36_EB2LPGROx6sBCnssg==)

| The reign of terror of Gov. Eric Greitens will go down in history as one of the lowest episodes in Missouri political history. Tomorrow we will hear many explanations for why he finally resigned after all that's occurred. I wanted to reach out to say my piece: it's because Missourians didn't let up.
When engaged citizens put consistent, principled pressure on their leaders, we get results. Getting involved in politics, knocking on doors, calling the offices of our elected officials...it all makes an impact. Gov. Greitens resigned not because of the lawsuits, the indictments, or because members of his own party urged him to leave--he gave in because regular people across the state stood up and demanded accountability.
We may not be able to force Ann Wagner to resign, but we can send her to an early retirement in November.
If you are tired of people like Eric Greitens, Ann Wagner, and Donald Trump winning elections and taking control of our government, [I need you now. Chip in $25 or more to help me take back Missouri's Second Congressional District.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCdE77UTiG7PBzEI1F3wbLYb2OiJK3-Da9prFeEkL6daiNgpz38McOqe5z_YPpxqi9D3ndAKiHVKZoRK4JzZ82_Kn4x2Wmvz7Nyu13JyrxMYszzQ45jQNnMOgcK3keRdO1mKZmIyK8BmLgZlx_Bd2kXa4Od0Z7t_4Ov-Y0R6hiS50wh6TmlUy13dLfqByeVCHfuJVjsUBGJ93paA2gYAfLjyiL0zO6MUWV5e9tquG3O9f1Yp6t_KNg==&c=7Xng7uyU6snLbsUngYK47GeJ8_6tFoCN-1_O1PWuJVmwzXU6pI557Q==&ch=yh8tSIoDLceUIi5CUc5ZUx5VevhQorloyn36_EB2LPGROx6sBCnssg==) Or [join my campaign team](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCdE77UTiG7PBzEI1F3wbLYb2OiJK3-Da9prFeEkL6daiNgpz38McOqe5z_YPpxqrE98tFJfiYXd8GjEpQCMMsfXxh21fIZHDqo7jbpadEqB55mDERLbxLB3ALUFqGxf_yspoJBgwHRL_Wgf9d2mUCTAojhv_MLKQH4oQxzOf9JcEa9VfmL5P2gn7UsTgwP2C7OU3wvFwR4k3uomIeexDAXid33qp1BuYOKOlVFcZbw=&c=7Xng7uyU6snLbsUngYK47GeJ8_6tFoCN-1_O1PWuJVmwzXU6pI557Q==&ch=yh8tSIoDLceUIi5CUc5ZUx5VevhQorloyn36_EB2LPGROx6sBCnssg==) and help us get out the vote on August and November.
[Our campaign is building the coalition needed to win: Democrats, independents, moderate swing voters, and Republicans who are disgusted with the hatred, incompetence, and absence of leadership in Washington, D.C.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCdE77UTiG7PBzEI1F3wbLYb2OiJK3-Da9prFeEkL6daiNgpz38McOqe5z_YPpxqi9D3ndAKiHVKZoRK4JzZ82_Kn4x2Wmvz7Nyu13JyrxMYszzQ45jQNnMOgcK3keRdO1mKZmIyK8BmLgZlx_Bd2kXa4Od0Z7t_4Ov-Y0R6hiS50wh6TmlUy13dLfqByeVCHfuJVjsUBGJ93paA2gYAfLjyiL0zO6MUWV5e9tquG3O9f1Yp6t_KNg==&c=7Xng7uyU6snLbsUngYK47GeJ8_6tFoCN-1_O1PWuJVmwzXU6pI557Q==&ch=yh8tSIoDLceUIi5CUc5ZUx5VevhQorloyn36_EB2LPGROx6sBCnssg==)
Tomorrow, and every day leading up to Election Day on Tuesday, November 6, we will demand accountability from all of our leaders. No one gets a pass when they breach the public trust.
Mark

clean_body: Missourians demanded accountability and trust | | | | | | == | == | | The reign of terror of Gov. Eric Greitens will go down in history as one of the lowest episodes in Missouri political history. Tomorrow we will hear many explanations for why he finally resigned after all that's occurred. I wanted to reach out to say my piece: it's because Missourians didn't let up. When engaged citizens put consistent, principled pressure on their leaders, we get results. Getting involved in politics, knocking on doors, calling the offices of our elected officials...it all makes an impact. Gov. Greitens resigned not because of the lawsuits, the indictments, or because members of his own party urged him to leave--he gave in because regular people across the state stood up and demanded accountability. We may not be able to force Ann Wagner to resign, but we can send her to an early retirement in November. If you are tired of people like Eric Greitens, Ann Wagner, and Donald Trump winning elections and taking control of our government, == Or == and help us get out the vote on August and November. == Tomorrow, and every day leading up to Election Day on Tuesday, November 6, we will demand accountability from all of our leaders. No one gets a pass when they breach the public trust. Mark | | | | | == | | | | | == | Paid for by Osmack for Missouri | P.O. # _One Week Until Election Day!_
---
| **Five Ways** You Can Help Michael Win the **June 5th** Republican Primary.
---
|
---

---
**1.** **[Click Here](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=20963fe7c5&e=6645c92bcf)** to sign up to work at your local polling location to remind people to vote on Election Day, or volunteer with the campaign in other ways!

| | [ ](mailto:?subject=Vote%20for%20Michael%20Guest&body=Hey!%0A%0AI'm%20emailing%20you%20to%20let%20you%20know%20I'm%20supporting%20Michael%20Guest%20for%20Congress%20on%20June%205th%20because%20he%20has%20the%20experience%20to%20be%20an%20effective%20leader%20in%20Congress%20and%20has%20the%20Christian%20moral%20values%20we%20need%20in%20a%20Congressman.%20I%20hope%20you%20help%20me%20spread%20the%20word%20about%20Michael%20and%20his%20Conservative%20Values.%0A%0AFor%20more%20information%20about%20Michael%2C%20you%20can%20visit%20his%20website%2C%20www.michaelguest.ms.%20There%20you%20will%20find%20information%20about%20Michael's%20conservative%20platform%20and%20ideas%20to%20make%20Mississippi%20an%20even%20better%20place%20to%20live%2C%20worship%2C%20and%20raise%20a%20family.%0A%0AAlso%2C%20you%20can%20like%20his%20Facebook%20page%2C%20www.facebook.com%2Fmichaelguestforcongress%2C%20for%20updates%20about%20the%20campaign.%20%0A%0APlease%20remind%20your%20friends%20and%20family%20to%20vote%20for%20Michael%20Guest%20on%20June%205th!)
---

[Click here](mailto:?subject=Vote%20for%20Michael%20Guest&body=Hey!%0A%0AI'm%20emailing%20you%20to%20let%20you%20know%20I'm%20supporting%20Michael%20Guest%20for%20Congress%20on%20June%205th%20because%20he%20has%20the%20experience%20to%20be%20an%20effective%20leader%20in%20Congress%20and%20has%20the%20Christian%20moral%20values%20we%20need%20in%20a%20Congressman.%20I%20hope%20you%20help%20me%20spread%20the%20word%20about%20Michael%20and%20his%20Conservative%20Values.%0A%0AFor%20more%20information%20about%20Michael%2C%20you%20can%20visit%20his%20website%2C%20www.michaelguest.ms.%20There%20you%20will%20find%20information%20about%20Michael's%20conservative%20platform%20and%20ideas%20to%20make%20Mississippi%20an%20even%20better%20place%20to%20live%2C%20worship%2C%20and%20raise%20a%20family.%0A%0AAlso%2C%20you%20can%20like%20his%20Facebook%20page%2C%20www.facebook.com%2Fmichaelguestforcongress%2C%20for%20updates%20about%20the%20campaign.%20%0A%0APlease%20remind%20your%20friends%20and%20family%20to%20vote%20for%20Michael%20Guest%20on%20June%205th!) to forward an email to your friends and family to let them know about Michael's Conservative Values and remind them to vote on June 5th.
| [ ](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=2422f894c0&e=6645c92bcf)
---

---
**5.
[Click Here](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=e9bb57534c&e=6645c92bcf) to Volunteer Around the Distict to Remind People to Vote for Michael Guest on June 5th!**

name: Kenyarn Maxfield,
subject: 30 Days for Donna Edwards
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838be/3906518950/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I hope you had a great holiday weekend spent with friends and loved ones. I wanted to make sure you saw Rahsheim's note below. Last Saturday marked 30 days before the Maryland Primary election, and we are two weeks from the beginning of Early Voting. **Donna needs our help more than ever to become the next Prince George 's County Executive. [Can we count on you to volunteer as a poll worker? ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838bf/3906518950/VEsE/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Kenyarn Maxfield Field Director Donna Edwards for Prince George's County Executive **\------Forwarded Message------** Dear Friend, In a few weeks, the voters of Prince George's County will choose their next County Executive. I'm going to be honest with you: Donna's race for County Executive will be a close one, and she needs your help now more than ever to win the election. Big developers and corrupt officials have had control of our politics for too long. That's why Donna is running -- as county executive, Donna will put the working families and their children first, and she will put policies in place to enable every resident to thrive. Donna will make big developers pay their fair share. Donna is the best person for the job, but she can't win this election alone. **This Saturday marks 30 days before the June 26th Maryland Primary Election, and we need your help to get out the vote for Donna Edwards.[Will you sign up to volunteer as a poll worker?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838bf/3906518950/VEsF/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer") ** Donna is not only a champion for working families but a concerned resident of the Prince George's County community. Her vision for our county includes improving education, keeping our streets safe, taking care of our seniors and increasing pay for low-wage workers. We're growing a movement made up of teachers, municipal leaders, workers, and community members coming together to help make her vision a reality, and to ensure our county has the leadership it deserves.**[ I hope you will join Team Donna and sign up to volunteer in the weeks leading up to the June 26th primary. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838bf/3906518950/VEsC/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Thank you for your support, and for all the work you do. Let's build a better Prince George's County together. Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager Donna for Prince George's County Executive
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838bc/3906518950/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838bd/3906518950/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838ba/3906518950/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer

P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

[Unsubscribe](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2f/767134fb/5f7fa8b9/433838bb/3906518950/VEsO/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

This Saturday marks 30 days before the June 26th Maryland Primary Election, and we need your help to get out the vote for Donna Edwards. "" Donna is not only a champion for working families but a concerned resident of the Prince George's County community. Her vision for our county includes improving education, keeping our streets safe, taking care of our seniors and increasing pay for low-wage workers. We're growing a movement made up of teachers, municipal leaders, workers, and community members coming together to help make her vision a reality, and to ensure our county has the leadership it deserves. "" Thank you for your support, and for all the work you do. Let's build a better Prince George's County together. Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager Donna for Prince George's County Executive | "" "" "" Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer P.O. Box 44343 Fort Washington, MD 20749 ""

name: Peter
subject: looping you in on our campaign strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Think about this: there are 35 Senate seats up for grabs in the midterm elections, and Indiana's race has been the most expensive in the nation so far. |
---

| | Peter,

Think about this: there are 35 Senate seats up for grabs in the midterm elections, and Indiana's race has been the most expensive in the nation so far. **But Joe 's committed to running a frugal operation on a tight budget -- just like Hoosiers do every single day.**

Rep. Mike Braun's budget isn't so tight, however: he spent **_$6,000,000.00_** from his own bank account to buy the GOP nomination, and Karl Rove's super PAC is already running attack ads on his behalf! **If we 're going to beat these shady dark money groups, we can't afford to cut ANY piece of our strategy: not our advertising plan, not our voter contact plan, and definitely not our organizing plan!**

**That 's why we've set a goal of bringing on 1,100 first-time donors before midnight on Thursday. Will you pitch in to help us meet this critical end-of-month goal so we'll have the resources we need to implement every single piece of our campaign strategy? >>** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f91190/3086983387/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180529.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f91193/3086983387/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180529.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f91192/3086983387/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180529.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f9118d/3086983387/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180529.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f9118c/3086983387/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?refcode=20180529.2nd")**
We can spend all day analyzing how many votes we need in which precincts, but none of that matters if we don't have the resources to actually get out there and talk to Hoosiers. To make matters worse, if we don't meet our targets, Joe will be totally defenseless against the constant stream of attacks from out-of-state GOP groups!

In 2012, Joe proved the pundits wrong and won because of our strong ground game. I'm confident that if we're able to execute the full strategy we have planned, we can do the same thing this year. But unfortunately, it will come down to money -- whether we can pay for everything we have planned.

**And that 's why I'm coming to you. [Will you pitch in before our Thursday deadline to give us the resources we need to out-organize Rep. Mike Braun in all 92 counties? >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f9118f/3086983387/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?refcode=20180529.2d&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Peter

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f6/7377f838/3feda8e3/51f9118e/3086983387/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?refcode=20180529.2d&amount=25")**
---

|
---
